name: Search Input
purpose: Compact search and filter entry for navigation rails, command bars, and content lists.

structures.name: Toolbar Search
structures.notes: A narrow input used in top bars and utility rows.

structures.name: Panel Filter Input
structures.notes: Supports filter panels and quick settings forms.

structures.name: Search With Clear
structures.notes: Useful when the interface maintains a persistent query.

interactionNotes: Use the border and input tokens rather than elevation to separate the field from its background.
The ring token should be the primary focus affordance.
